one_time_description: Prior period adjustment: revenue of $651,589 incorrectly recorded in previous fiscal year related to CMHC Phase 12 project; also reclassification of energy project investments
economic_notes: GBEs include Chippewa Industrial Developments Limited, Ojibwe Legends Trading Company Ltd., and Ojibwe Filters and Industrial Supplies Ltd. Energy projects include Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation, 2401077 Ontario Inc., and 2479793 Ontario Inc. (wind energy). Grand Bend and Adelaide wind projects generating revenue.
notes: Comparative 2019 figures restated due to prior period adjustment (CMHC revenue misrecording and reclassification of energy project investments). GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis - not fully consolidated. Energy project investments shown net due to limited recourse debt. Trust funds in Ottawa total $5,708,494. Net investment in energy projects $18,782,803. Community Services expenses $13,637,952 is the largest expense category (Schedule 1). ISC funding calculated as Grant + Fixed contribution + Set contribution = $662,295 + $3,487,642 + $182,835. Total government transfers include ISC + Health Canada + CMHC + Other federal + Province of Ontario + Southern First Nations Secretariat + Union of Ontario Indians.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
